claim: LangChain's voice input agent pattern chains speech-to-text, language model, and text-to-speech—enabling real-time conversational AI without manual turn-taking.
actionable: Use LangChain's VoiceInput + ChatModel + TextToSpeechOutput chain for hands-free agent interactions; implement streaming to reduce perceived latency.
source_title: Build a voice agent with LangChain

claim: When building voice agents, inject system messages that instruct the model to keep responses brief and conversational—reduces synthesized speech duration.
actionable: Add a system prompt like 'Keep responses under 2 sentences' to voice agent models to speed up perceived responsiveness and avoid listener fatigue.
source_title: Build a voice agent with LangChain
